name: ARIA required context role
description: This rule checks that an element with an explicit semantic role exists inside its required context.
applicability_text: This rule applies to any [HTML or SVG element][] that is [included in the accessibility tree][] and has a [WAI-ARIA 1.2][aria 1.2] [explicit semantic role][] with a [required context role][], except if the element has an [implicit semantic role][] that is identical to its [explicit semantic role][].
